arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes Leicester City point after celebrating Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall's Chelsea goal
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca emphasised his belief in former Leicester City favourite Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall after jumping for joy over the midfielder’s first Chelsea goal. The Italian coach said Dewsbury-Hall has had to adjust from being the star man at City to just a member of the squad at Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper makes prediction over Leicester City's 'rocky road' as Nottingham Forest give clues
arts.sum: Leicester City’s path to success will be a “rocky road” but they will be better placed for coming through what Steve Cooper hopes will be their only difficult patch of the season. At the City Ground, Cooper endured a winless run of nine matches, with five victories from 10 then following.

arts.ttl: Leicester City suffer injury blow ahead of Bournemouth with Steve Cooper coy on absent players
arts.sum: But there could be more players absent from the weekend’s clash with Bournemouth, Cooper revealing that a couple of players haven’t trained this week. There’s been a couple of kicks for some players that we’ve had to manage through the week and that have not trained yet, but hopefully they’re getting over that and we’ll see if they’re available for the weekend.”

arts.ttl: Preview: Leicester City vs. Bournemouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Bournemouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Leicester lineup vs. Bournemouth: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Leicester City could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth lineup vs. Leicester: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Bournemouth could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Leicester City.
